steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is 'The allocation' — a singular noun. The verb must agree with it in number and fit the past-tense context.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'are': Plural present tense; does not agree with the singular subject 'allocation' and is the wrong tense. ✗
  • Choice B — 'was': Singular past tense; agrees with 'allocation' and fits the historical context. ✓
  • Choice C — 'have been': Plural present-perfect form; does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — 'were': Plural past tense; does not agree with the singular subject 'allocation.' ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
